description_long: This is a brown leather lace-up shoe with a rounded toe and a low, flat heel. The upper is made from smooth leather, featuring visible stitching along the seams and around the sole. The shoe has a classic design with five eyelets for laces, which are threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern and tied at the top. The sole appears to be made of a dense, dark material, likely rubber or synthetic, and is attached with visible stitching. The interior is lined with a softer material, possibly fabric or leather, for comfort. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the shoe appears to be in new or like-new condition.
description: A brown leather lace-up shoe with a rounded toe, visible stitching, and a flat sole. The shoe is clean, well-constructed, and features a classic criss-cross lacing style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, central seam, and laces tied at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth leather upper, five eyelets, and the flat, stitched sole.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the heel, back seam, and the top opening of the shoe.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuous leather surface, stitching, and the sole profile.
